 import argparse, os, json, numpy as np, torch, torch.nn as nn

 

-class DLinear(nn.Module):

+class Model(nn.Module):

     def __init__(self, seq_len=96, pred_len=720, n_feat=7, kernel=25):

         super().__init__()

-        self.seq_len=seq_len; self.pred_len=pred_len; self.n_feat=n_feat

-        self.linear_trend = nn.Linear(seq_len, pred_len)

-        self.linear_season = nn.Linear(seq_len, pred_len)

+        self.seq_len = seq_len

+        self.pred_len = pred_len

+        self.n_feat = n_feat

         self.kernel = kernel

+        self.nlinear = nn.ModuleList([nn.Linear(seq_len, pred_len) for _ in range(n_feat)])

+        self.linear_trend = nn.ModuleList([nn.Linear(seq_len, pred_len) for _ in range(n_feat)])

+        self.linear_season = nn.ModuleList([nn.Linear(seq_len, pred_len) for _ in range(n_feat)])

+        self.alpha = nn.Parameter(torch.tensor(0.5))

     def moving_avg(self, x):

-        pad = self.kernel//2

-        x_pad = torch.cat([x[:, :1, :].repeat(1,pad,1), x, x[:, -1:, :].repeat(1,pad,1)], dim=1)

+        pad = self.kernel // 2

+        x_pad = torch.cat([x[:, :1, :].repeat(1, pad, 1), x, x[:, -1:, :].repeat(1, pad, 1)], dim=1)

         x_t = x_pad.transpose(1,2)

         avg = torch.nn.functional.avg_pool1d(x_t, kernel_size=self.kernel, stride=1)

         return avg.transpose(1,2)

     def forward(self, x):

-        mu = x.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True); sd = x.std(dim=1, keepdim=True)+1e-5

-        xn = (x-mu)/sd

-        trend = self.moving_avg(xn); season = xn-trend

-        t = self.linear_trend(trend.transpose(1,2))

-        s = self.linear_season(season.transpose(1,2))

-        return (t+s).transpose(1,2)*sd + mu

+        last = x[:, -1:, :]

+        xn = x - last

+        n_outs = []

+        for c in range(self.n_feat):

+            n_outs.append(self.nlinear[c](xn[:,:,c]))

+        n_out = torch.stack(n_outs, dim=-1) + last

+        trend = self.moving_avg(x)

+        season = x - trend

+        t_outs=[]; s_outs=[]

+        for c in range(self.n_feat):

+            t_outs.append(self.linear_trend[c](trend[:,:,c]))

+            s_outs.append(self.linear_season[c](season[:,:,c]))

+        d_out = torch.stack(t_outs,dim=-1) + torch.stack(s_outs,dim=-1)

+        a = torch.sigmoid(self.alpha)

+        return a*n_out + (1-a)*d_out

-class DLinear(nn.Module):

+# Channel-independent: one linear per channel from last-value-subtracted input.

+# Combined NLinear+DLinear ensemble inside one model for robustness.

+class Model(nn.Module):

     def __init__(self, seq_len=96, pred_len=720, n_feat=7, kernel=25):

         super().__init__()

         self.seq_len = seq_len

         self.pred_len = pred_len

         self.n_feat = n_feat

-        self.linear_trend = nn.Linear(seq_len, pred_len)

-        self.linear_season = nn.Linear(seq_len, pred_len)

         self.kernel = kernel

+        # Per-channel linear weights for NLinear

+        self.nlinear = nn.ModuleList([nn.Linear(seq_len, pred_len) for _ in range(n_feat)])

+        self.linear_trend = nn.ModuleList([nn.Linear(seq_len, pred_len) for _ in range(n_feat)])

+        self.linear_season = nn.ModuleList([nn.Linear(seq_len, pred_len) for _ in range(n_feat)])

+        self.alpha = nn.Parameter(torch.tensor(0.5))

     def moving_avg(self, x):

         pad = self.kernel // 2

         x_pad = torch.cat([x[:, :1, :].repeat(1, pad, 1), x, x[:, -1:, :].repeat(1, pad, 1)], dim=1)

@@ -68,27 +71,37 @@
         avg = torch.nn.functional.avg_pool1d(x_t, kernel_size=self.kernel, stride=1)

         return avg.transpose(1,2)

     def forward(self, x):

-        mu = x.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)

-        sd = x.std(dim=1, keepdim=True) + 1e-5

-        xn = (x - mu)/sd

-        trend = self.moving_avg(xn)

-        season = xn - trend

-        t = self.linear_trend(trend.transpose(1,2))

-        s = self.linear_season(season.transpose(1,2))

-        out = (t + s).transpose(1,2)

-        out = out * sd + mu

-        return out

+        # x: [B, L, C]

+        # NLinear: subtract last value

+        last = x[:, -1:, :]

+        xn = x - last

+        n_outs = []

+        for c in range(self.n_feat):

+            n_outs.append(self.nlinear[c](xn[:,:,c]))

+        n_out = torch.stack(n_outs, dim=-1) + last

+        # DLinear

+        trend = self.moving_avg(x)

+        season = x - trend

+        t_outs=[]; s_outs=[]

+        for c in range(self.n_feat):

+            t_outs.append(self.linear_trend[c](trend[:,:,c]))

+            s_outs.append(self.linear_season[c](season[:,:,c]))

+        d_out = torch.stack(t_outs,dim=-1) + torch.stack(s_outs,dim=-1)

+        a = torch.sigmoid(self.alpha)

+        return a*n_out + (1-a)*d_out
